message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant "用户信息正确请求URL" as User
participant "UrlFilterSecurityInterceptor" as Interceptor
participant "UrlMetadataSourceService" as MetadataSource
participant "UrlConfigAttribute" as ConfigAttr
participant "UrlAccessDecisionManager" as DecisionManager

User -> Interceptor : Authentication Request
Interceptor -> MetadataSource : getAttributes(Object object)
MetadataSource -> ConfigAttr : UrlConfigAttribute(HttpServletRequest httpServletRequest)
Interceptor -> DecisionManager : decide(Authentication authentication, Object object, Collection<ConfigAttribute> configAttributes)

@enduml
```
